title: Visual Brainstorm logo — round 1 (cluster)
prompt: Four divergent directions for the project logo. Select the ones with legs, note anything per-option, mark a remix pair if two should be mashed up, and set the dials.

options.label: Classic bulb
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M24 6a12 12 0 0 0-7 21.5c1.6 1.3 3 3 3 5v1.5h8V32.5c0-2 1.4-3.7 3-5A12 12 0 0 0 24 6Z" stroke="#a855f7"/><path d="M20 39h8M22 43h4"/></svg>
